title: AI Extraction Defense — five-layer architecture protecting proprietary AI models from being extracted, copied, or distilled by adversaries
public_claim: An extraction-defense architecture for protecting valuable analytical models from copying, distillation, or downstream imitation.
distinctive_mechanism: It treats model extraction as a counterintelligence problem: L1 behavioral shaping, L2 dynamic controls, L3 canary narratives, L4 tarpit/degraded-environment design, access segmentation, query-behavior signals, output fingerprinting, latency injection, logical loops, and post-hoc extraction detection work together.
